name: Engram persistent memory
description: Memory persistence across Claude Code sessions via MCP server

externalTool.name: engram

install.linux: mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/Gentleman-Programming/engram/releases/latest | grep -o "https://[^\"]*linux_$(uname -m | sed -e s/x86_64/amd64/ -e s/aarch64/arm64/)\.tar\.gz" | head -1 | xargs curl -fsSL | tar -xz -C ~/.local/bin engram

externalTool.postInstall: claude plugin marketplace add Gentleman-Programming/engram && claude plugin install engram
